html:
Exclusive to:
The Lunar Altars are three types of altars created by inserting the respective pieces into Celestial Fissures. If all three Lunar Altars are built close to each other, within 5 tiles, the Mysterious Energy will appear. After spawning, the Mysterious Energy will release a pulse, completely replacing the current day with a Full Moon and causing moonstorms to appear on the map. During these full moons, Enlightenment will replace Sanity.

While the Mysterious Energy is active, the three Celestial Altars cannot be removed from their Celestial Fissures. Attempting to hammer the Altars will damage the player in a similar fashion to the Nightmare Throne, but will not destroy their tool.

Contents

  • 1 Celestial Altar
    • 1.1 Celestial Altar Pieces
  • 2 Celestial Sanctum
    • 2.1 Celestial Sanctum Pieces
  • 3 Celestial Tribute
    • 3.1 Inactive Celestial Tribute
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Celestial Altar

Celestial Altar QuotesIncomplete Altar Quotes

The Celestial Altar is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is created by assembling the Celestial Altar Pieces over a Celestial Fissure.

When fully assembled, it grants access to the Celestial Tab while the player is standing next to it. It can be hammered to obtain the pieces again.

Celestial Altar Pieces

Celestial Altar Base QuotesCelestial Altar Orb QuotesCelestial Altar Idol Quotes

“It looks like it plugs into something.”

-

The three pieces required to assemble the Celestial Altar can be found scattered around the Lunar Mine Biome, trapped in Inviting Formations. They will be dropped when mined, and then must be placed in a Celestial Fissure in the correct order: Base, Orb, Idol. This will create the completed Celestial Altar. They can be carried the same way as Chess Pieces or Suspicious Marble.

Celestial Sanctum

The Celestial Sanctum is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is created by assembling the Celestial Sanctum Pieces over a Celestial Fissure.

When fully assembled, it grants access to the Celestial Tab while the player is standing next to it, offering the same recipes as the Celestial Altar and Celestial Tribute. It can be hammered to obtain the pieces again.

Assembling the Celestial Sanctum is required to spawn the Mysterious Energy.

Celestial Sanctum Pieces

Celestial Sanctum Icon QuotesCelestial Sanctum Ward Quotes

“It looks like it plugs into something.”

-

The two pieces required to assemble the Celestial Sanctum can be found by using an Astral Detector. They can be carried the same way as Chess Pieces or Suspicious Marble.

Both Celestial Sanctum Pieces are buried somewhere on the main island.

Celestial Tribute

The Celestial Tribute is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is created by placing an Inactive Celestial Tribute on a Celestial Fissure.

It grants access to the Celestial Tab with the same recipes as the Celestial Altar and Celestial Sanctum. It is required to be in close proximity to the Celestial Sanctum and Celestial Altar to summon the Mysterious Energy.

Inactive Celestial Tribute

“It looks like it plugs into something.”

-

The Inactive Celestial Tribute is dropped by the Crab King upon death when a Pearl's Pearl had been socketed. A Pinchin' Winch is required to pull it out of the water after it drops.

It can be carried the same way as Chess Pieces or Suspicious Marble.

Trivia

  • Each of the fully constructed lunar altars have a different crafting sound effect when crafting celestial tab items next to them.
  • The Celestial Altar was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • A fully constructed Celestial Altar also shares a similar appearance to the Moon Rock Idol, possibly hinting that the Altar is honoring the physical appearance of the Moon.
  • The Celestial Tribute was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • When active, the Celestial Tribute resembles the Crescent Moon depiction found in the Metheus Puzzle murals.
  • The Celestial Sanctum was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • A sanctum is a sacred or safe place, which suggests the Ward could be protecting the Icon.
  • As observed by Wickerbottom, the Celestial Champion uses aspects of each lunar altar during each of its phases. Its first phase resembles the Celestial Sanctum, the second phase resembles the Celestial Altar, and its third phase the Celestial Tribute.

Gallery

  • Winona carrying a Celestial Altar Base.
  • Wortox carrying a Celestial Altar Base.
  • Wormwood carrying a Celestial Altar Base.
  • Wurt carrying a Celestial Altar Base.
  • Winona carrying a Celestial Altar Orb.
  • Wortox carrying a Celestial Altar Orb.
  • Wormwood carrying a Celestial Altar Orb.
  • Wurt carrying a Celestial Altar Orb.
  • Winona carrying a Celestial Altar Idol.
  • Wortox carrying a Celestial Altar Idol.
  • Wormwood carrying a Celestial Altar Idol.
  • Wurt carrying a Celestial Altar Idol.
  • Concept art of Moonstorm ubdate test from Rhymes With Play #280
  • Celestial Champion appear animations Concept Art from Rhymes With Play #280.
  • Lunar altars concept art
StructuresHeavy Items

Exclusive to:
The Lunar Altars are three types of altars created by inserting the respective pieces into Celestial Fissures. If all three Lunar Altars are built close to each other, within 5 tiles, the Mysterious Energy will appear. After spawning, the Mysterious Energy will release a pulse, completely replacing the current day with a Full Moon and causing moonstorms to appear on the map. During these full moons, Enlightenment will replace Sanity.
While the Mysterious Energy is active, the three Celestial Altars cannot be removed from their Celestial Fissures. Attempting to hammer the Altars will damage the player in a similar fashion to the Nightmare Throne, but will not destroy their tool.

Celestial Altar QuotesIncomplete Altar Quotes
“Hm? What did you say?”
–Wilson, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Doesn't it feel nice to be back in one piece?”
–Willow, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“You have secrets for Wolfgang, friend?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Heehee. Yes, I'd love to hear a secret.”
–Wendy, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“GIVE ME THE POWER OF THE MOON”
–WX-78, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“The voice says it has knowledge to share.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“It wants to show me something.”
–Woodie, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Yes. I desire the knowledge of the moon.”
–Maxwell, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Tis a direct line tö Mani himself!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Hm? Do you need something from me?”
–Webber, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“You know how to get me home to maman?”
–Warly, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Saying stuff”
–Wormwood, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Inventions? What sort of inventions?”
–Winona, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Hyuyu, moon secrets are so fun!”
–Wortox, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“You need help, florp?”
–Wurt, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“You're right, people SHOULD listen to me more often.”
–Walter, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“Nothing wrong with dabbling in strange mystical magics from time to time.”
–Wanda, when examining a complete Celestial Altar.
“It wants to be finished.”
–Wilson, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Almost done, I swear.”
–Willow, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Wolfgang like to help new friends.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“It doesn't feel good to be incomplete.”
–Wendy, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“ARE MY AUDIO PORTS MALFUNCTIONING?”
–WX-78, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“It says it'll share a secret with me if I complete it.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Oh great, now I'm really hearing voices.”
–Woodie, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“There is powerful energy pouring out of it.”
–Maxwell, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“You shall soon be complete once more.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Don't worry, you'll be together again soon.”
–Webber, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Nearly there, mon ami!”
–Warly, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Needs more things”
–Wormwood, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Don't worry, we're nearly done.”
–Winona, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Hyuyu, you'll owe me one after this!”
–Wortox, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Still need something.”
–Wurt, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer finishes what they start!”
–Walter, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar
“I just can't stand leaving anything unfinished.”
–Wanda, when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar

The Celestial Sanctum is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is created by assembling the Celestial Sanctum Pieces over a Celestial Fissure.
When fully assembled, it grants access to the Celestial Tab while the player is standing next to it, offering the same recipes as the Celestial Altar and Celestial Tribute. It can be hammered to obtain the pieces again.
Assembling the Celestial Sanctum is required to spawn the Mysterious Energy.

The Celestial Tribute is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is created by placing an Inactive Celestial Tribute on a Celestial Fissure.
It grants access to the Celestial Tab with the same recipes as the Celestial Altar and Celestial Sanctum. It is required to be in close proximity to the Celestial Sanctum and Celestial Altar to summon the Mysterious Energy.

The Inactive Celestial Tribute is dropped by the Crab King upon death when a Pearl's Pearl had been socketed. A Pinchin' Winch is required to pull it out of the water after it drops.
It can be carried the same way as Chess Pieces or Suspicious Marble.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Each of the fully constructed lunar altars have a different crafting sound effect when crafting celestial tab items next to them.
The Celestial Altar was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
A fully constructed Celestial Altar also shares a similar appearance to the Moon Rock Idol, possibly hinting that the Altar is honoring the physical appearance of the Moon.
The Celestial Tribute was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
When active, the Celestial Tribute resembles the Crescent Moon depiction found in the Metheus Puzzle murals.
The Celestial Sanctum was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
A sanctum is a sacred or safe place, which suggests the Ward could be protecting the Icon.
As observed by Wickerbottom, the Celestial Champion uses aspects of each lunar altar during each of its phases. Its first phase resembles the Celestial Sanctum, the second phase resembles the Celestial Altar, and its third phase the Celestial Tribute.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bàn thờ Mặt Trăng là ba loại bàn thờ được tạo ra bằng cách chèn các mảnh tương ứng vào Khe nứt Thiên thể. Nếu cả 3 Bàn thờ Mặt Trăng được xây gần nhau thì trong vòng 5 ô sẽ xuất hiện Năng lượng Huyền bí. Sau khi sinh ra, Năng lượng Huyền bí sẽ giải phóng một xung điện, thay thế hoàn toàn ngày hiện tại bằng Trăng tròn và khiến bão trăng xuất hiện trên bản đồ. Trong những ngày trăng tròn này, Sự Khai sáng sẽ thay thế Tinh thần.
title: Lunar Altars
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} The '''Lunar Altars''' are three types of altars created by inserting the respective pieces into [[Celestial Fissure]]s. If all three Lunar Altars are built close to each other, within 5 tiles, the [[Mysterious Energy]] will appear. After spawning, the Mysterious Energy will release a pulse, completely replacing the current day with a Full Moon and causing moonstorms to appear on the map. During these full moons, Enlightenment will replace Sanity. While the Mysterious Energy is active, the three Celestial Altars cannot be removed from their Celestial Fissures. Attempting to hammer the Altars will damage the player in a similar fashion to the Nightmare Throne, but will not destroy their tool. ==[[File:Celestial Altar Map Icon.png|32px]] Celestial Altar== {{Object Infobox |repaired = Repaired By: {{Pic|24|Celestial Altar Orb}}{{Pic|24|Celestial Altar Idol}} |tool = Can be Hammered {{pic|32|Hammer}} |Box title = Celestial Altar |spawnCode = "moon_altar" |perk = Grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]].
Required to spawn {{pic24|Mysterious Energy}} |image = Celestial Altar.png|Inactive Celestial Altar Active.png|Active }} Celestial Altar Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = Hm? What did you say? |willow = Doesn't it feel nice to be back in one piece? |wolfgang = You have secrets for Wolfgang, friend? |wendy = Heehee. Yes, I'd love to hear a secret. |wx78 = GIVE ME THE POWER OF THE MOON |wickerbottom = The voice says it has knowledge to share. |woodie = It wants to show me something. |maxwell = Yes. I desire the knowledge of the moon. |wigfrid = Tis a direct line tö Mani himself! |webber = Hm? Do you need something from me? |winona = Inventions? What sort of inventions? |warly = You know how to get me home to maman? |wortox = Hyuyu, moon secrets are so fun! |wormwood = Saying stuff |wurt = You need help, florp? |walter = You're right, people SHOULD listen to me more often. |wanda = Nothing wrong with dabbling in strange mystical magics from time to time. |choose = wx78 |source = when examining a complete Celestial Altar. }} |-| Incomplete Altar Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = It wants to be finished. |willow = Almost done, I swear. |wolfgang = Wolfgang like to help new friends. |wendy = It doesn't feel good to be incomplete. |wx78 = ARE MY AUDIO PORTS MALFUNCTIONING? |wickerbottom = It says it'll share a secret with me if I complete it. |woodie = Oh great, now I'm really hearing voices. |maxwell = There is powerful energy pouring out of it. |wigfrid = You shall soon be complete once more. |webber = Don't worry, you'll be together again soon. |winona = Don't worry, we're nearly done. |warly = Nearly there, mon ami! |wortox = Hyuyu, you'll owe me one after this! |wormwood = Needs more things |wurt = Still need something. |walter = Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer finishes what they start! |wanda = I just can't stand leaving anything unfinished. |choose = wormwood |source = when examining an incomplete Celestial Altar }} The '''Celestial Altar''' is a [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is created by assembling the Celestial Altar Pieces over a [[Celestial Fissure]]. When fully assembled, it grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]] while the player is standing next to it. It can be hammered to obtain the pieces again. {{Clear}} === Celestial Altar Pieces=== {{Object Infobox |name = Celestial Altar Pieces |equipslot=body |icon = Celestial Altar Base.png|Base Celestial Altar Orb.png|Orb Celestial Altar Idol.png|Idol |image = Celestial Altar Base Dropped.png|Base Celestial Altar Orb Dropped.png|Orb Celestial Altar Idol Dropped.png|Idol |perk = Can be placed in a [[Celestial Fissure]].
Is required to assemble the Celestial Altar. |spawnFrom = [[File:Inviting Formation Base.png|24px|link=Inviting Formation]] [[File:Inviting Formation Orb.png|24px|link=Inviting Formation]] [[File:Inviting Formation Idol.png|24px|link=Inviting Formation]] ({{pic|24|Pickaxe}}) |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "moon_altar_glass"
"moon_altar_seed"
"moon_altar_idol"}} Celestial Altar Base Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = It doesn't want to be on the ground. |willow = Yeah, of course I'll lug you over there. |wolfgang = Tell Wolfgang where you go and he will take you. |wendy = It wants to find its missing pieces. |wx78 = I WILL HELP YOU IF YOU WILL BE QUIET |wickerbottom = I believe it is trying to communicate with me telepathically. |woodie = I think it wants one of those moon fissures. |maxwell = This is not its desired destination. |wigfrid = What doth thou want, fair jewel? |webber = It can't talk like we do, but it's a friend. |winona = Huh? You talkin' to me? |warly = Hm? Where would you like to go, mon ami? |wortox = Let's see if we can put you back together again. |wormwood = What's this for? |wurt = It look sad there. |walter = Don't worry, I'll help you get where you need to go. |wanda = It's showing me a place... is it a premonition or a memory? |source = when examining a Celestial Altar Base |choose = winona }} |-| Celestial Altar Orb Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = It wants me to give it a home. |willow = Where do you want to go? |wolfgang = Yes, Wolfgang will carry you. |wendy = It wants some sort of energy. |wx78 = IT WILL NOT STOP CHATTERING |wickerbottom = It is projecting images of an altar into my mind. |woodie = It wants me to take it to one of those cracks in the ground. |maxwell = Where shall I take you? |wigfrid = The göds cömmune tö me thröugh thee. |webber = It wants to go to one of those cracks in the ground. |winona = You're a pretty lil fella. |warly = Of course I can take you home. |wortox = What a funny voice you have. How it rattles around in my head! |wormwood = Trapped? |wurt = You need to go home, flort. |walter = Do you need some assistance? |wanda = This isn't where it needs to be. |source = when examining a Celestial Altar Orb |choose = wortox }} |-| Celestial Altar Idol Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = I feel compelled to carry it somewhere. |willow = Okay, let me take you home. |wolfgang = Wolfgang is here to help, yes. |wendy = Abby and I will help put you back together. |wx78 = PLEASE STOP TALKING TO ME |wickerbottom = Its energy is prodding at the edges of my mind. |woodie = It wants me to carry it somewhere. |maxwell = Let me know your wishes, and I will oblige. |wigfrid = Make thy will known to me, idol! |webber = It doesn't want to be here. We don't either. |winona = I'll fix ya up right proper! |warly = Oui, I'll take you back where you belong. |wortox = You've really fallen apart, huh? |wormwood = Oh... glowy! |wurt = Where you want to go? |walter = We have to help it, Woby! |wanda = I think I know where it wants to go. |source = when examining a Celestial Altar Idol |choose = wendy }}{{Scrapbook_Info|It looks like it plugs into something.}} The three pieces required to assemble the Celestial Altar can be found scattered around the [[Lunar Mine]] [[Biomes|Biome]], trapped in [[Inviting Formation]]s. They will be dropped when mined, and then must be placed in a [[Celestial Fissure]] in the correct order: '''Base''', '''Orb''', '''Idol'''. This will create the completed Celestial Altar. They can be carried the same way as [[Chess Pieces]] or [[Suspicious Marble]]. {{clr}} ==[[File:Celestial Sanctum Map Icon.png|32px]]Celestial Sanctum== {{Object Infobox |repaired = Repaired By: {{Pic|24|Celestial Sanctum Ward}} |tool = Can be Hammered {{pic|32|Hammer}} |Box title = Celestial Sanctum |image = Celestial Sanctum.png|Inactive Celestial Sanctum Active.png|Active |perk = Grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]].
Required to spawn {{pic24|Mysterious Energy}} |spawnCode = "moon_altar_astral" }} {{Quotes |wilson = It seems to be part of a larger mechanism. |willow = Back together again. |wolfgang = Seems happy now, Wolfgang thinks. |wendy = You are whole again. |wx78 = FULLY OPERATIONAL |wickerbottom = Are you ready to share your knowledge with me? |woodie = All back in one piece. |maxwell = Why do I get the sense... ah, I'm sure it's nothing. |wigfrid = I hear the whispers öf Mani. |webber = All together again! |winona = All the pieces are finally in their proper place. |warly = The ingredients are all together. |wortox = All together again. You must be over the moon, hyuyu! |wormwood = Ready? |wurt = All done, florp! |walter = I think it's ready. |wanda = The pieces are starting to come together. |choose = wolfgang}} The '''Celestial Sanctum''' is a [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is created by assembling the Celestial Sanctum Pieces over a [[Celestial Fissure]]. When fully assembled, it grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]] while the player is standing next to it, offering the same recipes as the [[Celestial Altar]] and [[Celestial Tribute]]. It can be hammered to obtain the pieces again. Assembling the Celestial Sanctum is required to spawn the [[Mysterious Energy]]. {{clr}} ===Celestial Sanctum Pieces=== {{Object Infobox |name= Celestial Sanctum Pieces |equipslot=body |icon = Celestial Sanctum Icon.png|Icon Celestial Sanctum Ward.png|Ward |image = Celestial Sanctum Icon Dropped.png|Icon Celestial Sanctum Ward Dropped.png|Ward |perk = Can be placed on a [[Celestial Fissure]] to assemble the Celestial Sanctum. |spawnCode = "moon_altar_icon"
"moon_altar_ward" |spawnFrom= {{pic24|Astral Detector Build|Astral Detector}} }} Celestial Sanctum Icon Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = I think I know just where you belong. |willow = Alright, alright, let's get going. |wolfgang = Wolfgang will carry you most mightily! |wendy = I will take you to your final resting place. |wx78 = ANOTHER CHATTERBOX |wickerbottom = It's projecting a sense of urgency into my mind. |woodie = You want me to get you home, eh? |maxwell = I know where you need to be. |wigfrid = It calls öut tö me, I must take heed. |webber = It wants to be back with the others. |winona = Now what were you doin' hiding underground? |warly = I'll have you home tout de suite! |wortox = You hid away with quite some skill, you're lucky that I had a drill! |wormwood = Silly! Home not under dirt |wurt = Found you! |walter = Woby and I will get you back together! |wanda = I do wish it would stop with all that frightful whispering. |choose = wormwood |source = when examining a Celestial Sanctum Icon }} |-| Celestial Sanctum Ward Quotes= {{Quotes |wilson = It wants to be with the others. |willow = You're right, I really am the best for helping you out. |wolfgang = Is not so heavy, Wolfgang will carry as far as you need! |wendy = So lost and alone... my sister and I will help you. |wx78 = IT WANTS TO BE REASSEMBLED |wickerbottom = It's communicating a need to be reconstructed. |woodie = Just how did you get underground? |maxwell = I'll take you to the others. |wigfrid = It has chösen me tö safeguard its passage höme. |webber = It's lonely, it wants its friends. |winona = Let's getcha fixed up. |warly = Patience mon ami, you'll be home soon. |wortox = Lost, found, now homeward bound! |wormwood = Lonely. Find friends |wurt = Glurgh... would be easier if you weren't so heavy. |walter = It's okay, we'll have you home in no time. |wanda = It feels like wheels have been set in motion... |choose = wilson |source = when examining a Celestial Sanctum Ward }} {{Scrapbook_Info|It looks like it plugs into something.}} The two pieces required to assemble the Celestial Sanctum can be found by using an [[Astral Detector]]. They can be carried the same way as [[Chess Pieces]] or [[Suspicious Marble]]. Both Celestial Sanctum Pieces are buried somewhere on the main island. {{clr}} ==[[File:Celestial Tribute Map Icon.png|32px]]Celestial Tribute== {{Object Infobox |tool = Can be Hammered {{pic|32|Hammer}} |Box title = Celestial Tribute |image = Celestial Tribute.png|Inactive Celestial Tribute Active.png|Active |perk = Grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]].
Required to spawn {{pic24|Mysterious Energy}} |spawnCode = "moon_altar_cosmic"}} {{Quotes |wilson = It feels like it's waiting for something. |willow = Why do I get the feeling we aren't done yet? |wolfgang = Such loud whisperings. Make head hurt. |wendy = The whispers... are getting louder... |wx78 = I AM STILL WAITING FOR MOON POWERS |wickerbottom = It says there's more knowledge yet to be found. |woodie = I don't get it, why does it feel like we're not finished yet? |maxwell = It is not yet time? |wigfrid = It is grateful, but my wörk is nöt yet döne. |webber = We think it says we're getting closer. |winona = Can't shake the feeling that this is all building up to somethin'... |warly = Something tells me this is part of a bigger recipe... |wortox = The stage is nearly set! |wormwood = Soon |wurt = It saying something... |walter = "It's almost time"? Time for what? |wanda = If I could have discovered this power first... ah well, I suppose it's in the past. |choose = wilson}} The '''Celestial Tribute''' is a [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is created by placing an '''Inactive Celestial Tribute''' on a [[Celestial Fissure]]. It grants access to the [[Celestial Tab]] with the same recipes as the [[Celestial Altar]] and [[Celestial Sanctum]]. It is required to be in close proximity to the [[Celestial Sanctum]] and [[Celestial Altar]] to summon the [[Mysterious Energy]]. {{Clear}} ===Inactive Celestial Tribute=== {{Object Infobox |equipslot=body |name = Inactive Celestial Tribute |image = Inactive Celestial Tribute Dropped.png |icon = Inactive Celestial Tribute.png |perk = Can be placed in a [[Celestial Fissure]]. |spawnFrom= {{pic|24|Crab King}} |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "moon_altar_crown"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I fished it up, now to find a fissure! |willow = Y'know, this would be a lot easier if you weren't so heavy. |wolfgang = Wolfgang will help you! |wendy = You're safe now. |wx78 = IT REQUIRES A COMPATIBLE DOCKING STATION |wickerbottom = Come now, let's get you back where you belong. |woodie = I know the drill, let's get you back where you belong. |maxwell = This powerful energy... I've seen it before. |wigfrid = I wönder höw that creature göt his claws ön this? |webber = It wants to go back home. |winona = Don't worry, I'll get you where you need to go. |warly = Come on mon ami, let's get you back where you belong! |wortox = Well, you've had quite the adventure, hyuyu! |wormwood = Lost? |wurt = Time to go home! |walter = Don't worry, we'll get you home! |wanda = I'll make better use of it than that old crab did. |source = When examining a Celestial Tribute |choose = webber}}{{Scrapbook_Info|It looks like it plugs into something.}} The '''Inactive Celestial Tribute''' is dropped by the [[Crab King]] upon death when a [[Pearl's Pearl]] had been socketed. A [[Pinchin' Winch]] is required to pull it out of the water after it drops. It can be carried the same way as [[Chess Pieces]] or [[Suspicious Marble]]. {{Clear}} == {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia == * Each of the fully constructed lunar altars have a different crafting sound effect when crafting celestial tab items next to them. * The Celestial Altar was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update. * A fully constructed Celestial Altar also shares a similar appearance to the [[Moon Rock Idol]], possibly hinting that the Altar is honoring the physical appearance of the Moon. * The Celestial Tribute was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update. * When active, the Celestial Tribute resembles the [[Moon Cycle|Crescent Moon]] depiction found in the [[Metheus Puzzles|Metheus Puzzle]] murals.[[File:TributeAndCycle.png|thumb|278x278px]] * The Celestial Sanctum was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update. * A sanctum is a sacred or safe place, which suggests the Ward could be protecting the Icon. * As observed by [[Wickerbottom]], the [[Celestial Champion]] uses aspects of each lunar altar during each of its phases. Its first phase resembles the Celestial Sanctum, the second phase resembles the Celestial Altar, and its third phase the Celestial Tribute. {{clear}} =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Celestial Altar Base Winona.png|[[Winona]] carrying a Celestial Altar Base. Celestial Altar Base Wortox.png|[[Wortox]] carrying a Celestial Altar Base. Celestial Altar Base Wormwood.png|[[Wormwood]] carrying a Celestial Altar Base. Celestial Altar Base Wurt.png|[[Wurt]] carrying a Celestial Altar Base. Celestial Altar Orb Winona.png|[[Winona]] carrying a Celestial Altar Orb. Celestial Altar Orb Wortox.png|[[Wortox]] carrying a Celestial Altar Orb. Celestial Altar Orb Wormwood.png|[[Wormwood]] carrying a Celestial Altar Orb. Celestial Altar Orb Wurt.png|[[Wurt]] carrying a Celestial Altar Orb. Celestial Altar Idol Winona.png|[[Winona]] carrying a Celestial Altar Idol. Celestial Altar Idol Wortox.png|[[Wortox]] carrying a Celestial Altar Idol. Celestial Altar Idol Wormwood.png|[[Wormwood]] carrying a Celestial Altar Idol. Celestial Altar Idol Wurt.png|[[Wurt]] carrying a Celestial Altar Idol.
